signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweet Volume Markets Lead Polymarket Activity | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Volume Markets Lead Polymarket Activity | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active markets as of early April 2026 focus on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (with "180-199" at 29%) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (18% on 1080-1119, 28% on 1120-1159, and 28% on 1120-1159 in related trackers).[1][2][3]
